---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Mint Android SDK
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

Describe the feature you would like to see added.

Example:
> Add callback for transaction success event.

---

## 🎯 Problem Statement

Explain the problem this feature solves.

Example:
> Currently there is no way to track transaction completion inside host app.

---

## 🧩 Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work.

Example:
> Add a listener interface like:

```java
MintSDKListener {
   void onSuccess();
   void onFailed();
}

```

🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.



📎 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots.


---
